title: The Hill Billy
writer: John Fox Jr., Marion Jackson, Waldemar Young
actors: Jack Pickford, Lucille Ricksen, Frank Leigh
plot: "Groundhog" Spence slays Jed McCoy's father and marries Mrs. McCoy to obtain her lands rich in coal. Jed loves Spence's niece, Emmy Lou, an attractive orphan who teaches him to read and write. Spence forces Emmy Lou to marry his s...
